# AudioObjectRemovePropertyListenerBlock(_:_:_:_:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Audio ](/documentation/coreaudio)

- [ AudioObjectRemovePropertyListenerBlock(_:_:_:_:) ](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectremovepropertylistenerblock(_:_:_:_:))

-  AudioObjectRemovePropertyListenerBlock(_:_:_:_:) 

Function# AudioObjectRemovePropertyListenerBlock(_:_:_:_:)

iOS 7.0+iPadOS 7.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.7+

```
func AudioObjectRemovePropertyListenerBlock(
    _ inObjectID: AudioObjectID,
    _ inAddress: UnsafePointer<AudioObjectPropertyAddress>,
    _ inDispatchQueue: dispatch_queue_t?,
    _ inListener: @escaping AudioObjectPropertyListenerBlock
) -> OSStatus
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectremovepropertylistenerblock(_:_:_:_:)#parameters)

`inObjectID`The AudioObject to unregister the listener from.

`inAddress`The AudioObjectPropertyAddress indicating from which property the listener should be removed.

`inDispatchQueue`The dispatch queue on which the listener block was being dispatched to.

`inListener`The AudioObjectPropertyListenerBlock being removed.

## [Return Value](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectremovepropertylistenerblock(_:_:_:_:)#return-value)

An OSStatus indicating success or failure.

## [Discussion](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectremovepropertylistenerblock(_:_:_:_:)#discussion)

Unregisters the given AudioObjectPropertyListenerBlock from receiving notifications when the given properties change.
